body.title: Move Google AI Studio API key from URL query param to header
body.result: x-goog-api-key header replaces ?key= URL param; grep for ?key= in sources.py returns empty
body.intention: I intend that the Google API key never appears in HTTP request URLs.
body.description:
Expert audit (Security Engineer) found GoogleSource.call() embeds the live API key in the HTTP URL as ?key=. Keys in URLs appear in server access logs, urllib debug traces, and any HTTP proxy. Move to x-goog-api-key header (Google's supported alternative to query-param auth).

**Affected files:** devices/inference/ (GoogleSource implementation)
**Design rules:** no live keys in plaintext logs
**Scope boundary:** IN — change authentication method from query param to header; OUT — other GoogleSource changes
**Completion criteria:** grep for '?key=' in the GoogleSource file returns empty; requests use x-goog-api-key header; existing tests still pass
